paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 224 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 124 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 28 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 6 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 35. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **42 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 49 days past due with 34 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** The oldest overdue task is 37 days past due with 32 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 47 days past due with 28 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **18 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 10 days past due with 24 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **23 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 22 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **45 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Shaan Lagisetty (CNG-20251169):** The oldest overdue task is 23 days past due with 14 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 15. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **77 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 12. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **25 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 5 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **19 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 9 payment tasks due this week.

**Karim-Merchant:** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **27 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 52 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jeff:** Carrying 50 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Giselle Garcia:** Carrying 42 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Milagros Porturas:** Carrying 34 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jonas De Cardenas:** Carrying 32 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Rey:** Carrying 14 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

326 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **297 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 84 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 56 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 52. This needs to turn around today.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 35 overdue — oldest first. **42 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 52 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 12 overdue — oldest first. **25 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 27 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 5 overdue — oldest first. **19 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 28 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
